points.text: Research and Markets projects the global arrayed CRISPR screening market revenue to grow by $1.64 billion at a 17.7% CAGR through 2030.
ATCC and Broad Institute collaborated to engineer 13 CRISPR-modified isogenic non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) cell lines harboring defined resistance mechanisms to the EGFR inhibitor osimertinib.
The CRISPR-engineered NSCLC models will be integrated into the Cancer Dependency Map (DepMap) to construct a response and resistance map (ResMap) of therapeutic vulnerabilities.
Metagenomi Therapeutics announced a publication in Nature Structural & Molecular Biology detailing a proprietary compact CRISPR nuclease with enhanced genome editing efficiency.
Metagenomi Therapeutics completed a pre-IND meeting for MGX-001 (Hemophilia A) following non-human primate data showing curative FVIII activity, targeting an IND submission in Q4 2026.
Metagenomi Therapeutics reported $160.8 million in cash and equivalents as of December 31, 2025, providing a runway through Q4 2027 to support its CRISPR-based pipeline.
Metagenomi Therapeutics demonstrated in vivo proof-of-concept for Antithrombin (AT-III) Deficiency using its MGX-001 site-specific genome integration system in non-human primates.
Metagenomi Therapeutics presented preclinical data for APOC3 as a new collaboration target with Ionis Pharmaceuticals under the Wave 1 of their partnership.
Biohub researchers identified a 3-amino acid formulation (methionine, arginine, serine) that boosts CRISPR gene editing efficiency from ~25% to nearly 90% in lipid nanoparticle delivery systems.
Rockefeller University researchers used CRISPR gene editing to reprogram hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSPCs) to produce broadly neutralizing antibodies (bNAbs) against HIV in mice.
Arrayed CRISPR Screening Market — Market Growth — Revenue projected to increase by $1.64 billion at 17.7% CAGR through 2030 driven by R&D investment.

ATCC / Broad Institute — CRISPR-engineered NSCLC models — Osimertinib resistance in EGFR-mutant lung cancer — Developed 13 isogenic cell lines using CRISPR gene editing and overexpression to replicate clinical resistance pathways; models available via DepMap portal.

Metagenomi Therapeutics — MGX-001 — Hemophilia A — Pre-IND meeting completed; curative FVIII activity demonstrated in non-human primates; IND submission planned Q4 2026; clinical trials targeted for 2027.
Metagenomi Therapeutics — Proprietary Compact CRISPR Nuclease — Genome Editing — Publication in Nature Structural & Molecular Biology highlights enhanced editing efficiency and compact size.
Metagenomi Therapeutics — MGX-001 Platform — Antithrombin (AT-III) Deficiency — In vivo proof-of-concept achieved in non-human primates, validating expansion into secreted protein disorders.

Biohub — CRISPR delivery via LNPs — Genetic mutation correction — Addition of methionine, arginine, and serine to lipid nanoparticles increased CRISPR editing efficiency to ~90% and mRNA delivery 20-fold in preclinical models.

Rockefeller University — CRISPR-engineered HSPCs — HIV prevention — Successfully integrated anti-HIV bNAb instructions into immunoglobulin loci of mouse stem cells, generating B cells that secrete protective antibodies long-term.
Research and Markets — Market intelligence publication — Arrayed CRISPR Screening — Released forecast projecting $1.64 billion revenue growth at 17.7% CAGR through 2030.

ATCC — Precision oncology tool development — CRISPR-engineered isogenic cell lines — Partnered with Broad Institute to release 13 NSCLC models for functional genomics and AI-driven drug discovery; data accessible via DepMap.

Broad Institute — Cancer dependency mapping — CRISPR-engineered resistance models — Integrated 13 new NSCLC lines into DepMap to accelerate discovery of combination therapies for osimertinib-resistant disease.

Metagenomi Therapeutics — In vivo genome editing commercialization — MGX-001 (Hemophilia A) + AT-III + APOC3 pipeline — $160.8M cash runway through Q4 2027; corporate rebranding completed to reflect strategic evolution.

Biohub — Optimization of gene therapy delivery platforms — CRISPR systems via amino acid-enhanced LNPs — Led by Daniel Zongjie Wang and Shana O. Kelley; findings published in Science Translational Medicine; applicable to any LNP formulation.

Arrayed CRISPR Screening — Mechanism: High-throughput genetic perturbation — Phase: Preclinical/Research — Population: N/A — Endpoints/Results: Market analysis indicates 17.7% CAGR growth trajectory through 2030.

CRISPR-engineered NSCLC models — Mechanism: CRISPR gene editing and gene overexpression to introduce defined resistance mutations — Phase: Preclinical research tool — Population: EGFR-mutant non-small cell lung cancer — Comparator: Parental drug-sensitive lines — Application: Uncover resistance pathways to osimertinib and identify drug combination strategies.

MGX-001 — Mechanism: Site-specific genome integration using proprietary compact CRISPR nuclease — Phase: Pre-IND — Population: Hemophilia A (non-human primates) — Endpoints/Results: Curative FVIII activity demonstrated.

MGX-001 Platform — Mechanism: Site-specific genome integration using compact CRISPR nuclease — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Antithrombin (AT-III) Deficiency (non-human primates) — Endpoints/Results: In vivo proof-of-concept achieved.

APOC3 Target — Mechanism: CRISPR-mediated editing (collaboration with Ionis) — Phase: Preclinical — Population: Cardiometabolic indications — Endpoints/Results: Data presented at Nature Conference 'Cracking the Code'.

CRISPR systems — Mechanism: Amino acid-enhanced lipid nanoparticle (LNP) fusion with cell membranes — Phase: Preclinical — Population: In vivo models — Comparator: Standard LNP formulations — Results: Editing efficiency increased from ~25% to ~90%; mRNA delivery increased 20-fold.

CRISPR-edited HSPCs — Mechanism: Genome editing of immunoglobulin loci in hematopoietic stem cells to encode bNAbs — Phase: Preclinical (mouse model) — Population: Mice transplanted with edited HSPCs — Endpoints/Results: Enduring production of anti-HIV bNAbs with ex vivo neutralization activity.
Arrayed CRISPR Screening Market — Market Valuation — Total revenue projected to grow by $1.64 billion at 17.7% CAGR through 2030.
Metagenomi Therapeutics / Ionis Pharmaceuticals — Collaboration expansion — APOC3 (Wave 1) — Four targets included in partnership; preclinical data presented at Nature Conference.
